title: Ocellochloa soderstromii

taxonomy: Ocellochloa soderstromii is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. This classification places it within the larger monocot clade, characterized by having one cotyledon or seed leaf during germination. Ocellochloa soderstromii is further categorized within the tribe Oryzeae, which includes a variety of grass species. The genus Ocellochloa is relatively small, containing several species of grasses found primarily in tropical and subtropical regions. Through its classification, scientists can better understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Ocellochloa soderstromii within the context of other plant species.
